zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Illingworth於大約1405年出生在英國奧可福爾吉丁頓。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1476年4月25日享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Illingworth于大约1405年出生在英国奧可福爾吉丁頓。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1476年4月25日享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Illingworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Illingworth in Yorkshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Ylla or Illa + the Old English connective -ing- + worth ‘enclosure’. See also Ellingsworth .

variants.name: Ellingford
meanings: English (Essex): possibly an altered form of the Yorkshire name   Illingworth  .

variants.name: Ellingsworth
meanings: English: variant of Illingworth , a habitational name from Illingworth, Yorkshire, from the Old English personal name Illa or Ylla (a short form of various personal names containing the first element hild ‘strife, battle’) + the Old English connective -ing- + worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Illingworth was born about 1405, in Kiddington, Oxfordshire, England. He had at least 1 daughter. He died on 25 April 1476, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Illingworth est né environ 1405, à Kiddington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1476, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Illingworth wurde um 1405 in Kiddington, Oxfordshire, England geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. April 1476 im Alter von 72 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Illingworth è nato il circa 1405 nel Kiddington, Oxfordshire, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 25 aprile 1476, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.Kiddington, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアキッドイントン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Illingworthは約1405年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアキッドイントンで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1476年4月25日に72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Illingworth(은)는 대략 1405년 영국 스퍼드실르 키딩턴에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1476년 4월 25일 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Illingworth nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Kiddington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1476, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Illingworth родился около 1405 г. в местности киддингтон, оксфордшир, Англия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 25 апреля 1476 г. в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Illingworth nació aproximadamente 1405, en Kiddington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 25 de abril de 1476, a la edad de 72 años.
